docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2018 BY PRO TEM MARC SEIDENFELD. PLAINTIFF STEPHANIE GULLIVER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 105.00 - SERVED MAR-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FIELD, STUART
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY GULLIVER, STEPHANIE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GULLIVER, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT FIELD, STUART ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GULLIVER, STEPHANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIELD, STUART $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,180.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
